jd_text: About the Company At Lummus Technology, innovation thrives, and excellence is a shared pursuit. When you join Lummus, you are empowered to make an impact and be part of a dynamic team that celebrates creativity, encourages professional development, and fosters collaboration. From our technology portfolio to our global workforce, Lummus is growing at a rapid pace, and we hope that you will grow with us during this exciting time. Lummus Consultants International (LCI) is an autonomous business within Lummus Technology that provides technical, environmental & social and management consulting services worldwide. We work primarily in the energy industry, with a depth of expertise in power generation, oil & gas, refining and petrochemicals. We maintain a very strong presence in the international technical due diligence markets to support the global financial industry. LCI has a far-reaching organization with offices in the United States, UK, the Middle East and Asia. About the Role Lummus Consultants is looking for a Business Development Director to grow the company into the area of technical and management consulting in the energy industry – offshore and onshore oil & gas, LNG, pipelines, power generation and transmission, as well as refining and petrochemicals. This role will be expected to help grow the consulting practice area in the fields of oil & Gas, power delivery and decarbonization and will primarily entail growing relationships with the financial community and project developers. Assignments require a high level of experience and ability to focus quickly on important issues. The individual we are seeking must be comfortable and confident to work in a seller/doer organization structure. Responsibilities Grow Lummus Consultants’ business – in cooperation with the existing business heads. His growth strategy should be heavily focused on technical solutions but with a broad business perspective beyond traditional due diligence assignments. Develop a business plan to capitalize on existing talents and resources within Lummus Consultants and Lummus Technology; the candidate’s strengths; and market opportunities. Grow name recognition of Lummus Consultants in all Energy industry segments (with assistance from the Lummus Communication team and other internal resources). Carry out business development, marketing, and proposal preparation efforts and lead Key Account Management teams efforts. Lead or participate in consulting project work. Prepare clear and concise written reports on assignments, develop conclusions and present clear and precise written and verbal results to clients. Expand the Lummus Consulting practice area (globally), consistent with the business plan – identify gaps in skills and potential recruits. Achieve objectives with minimal oversight. Management of the P&L forecast by close collaboration with his supervisor and finance. Report to Senior Director of Lummus Consultants in Dubai office. Qualifications A degree-educated Engineer; MBA is a plus but not required. The candidate should have at least 20 years relevant professional experience. Prior experience with an owner/operator or major engineering company and/or consultancy. Strong verbal and written communication skills, including ability to write clear and concise reports in English. The candidate should have strong interpersonal skills and be comfortable conversing with clients and senior management. Demonstrated management and project management skills. Required Skills Strong leadership abilities and excellent interpersonal skills. Strong communicator with excellent written and oral communication skills. Must have a high degree of self-motivation and energy. Must have proven ability to manage business forecasting, short and long term projection. Capability of earning respect from the team and capable of influencing others without authority. Excellent professional image/presentation. Knowledge of many cultures/international style. Strong commercial savvy and negotiating skills. Interest in being knowledgeable in all services offerings in Lummus Consultants portfolio. Ability to work well with finance partners. Must have a strong balance of technical and commercial capabilities. Dubai office. Relocation is not being offered. Job-related travel (business trips usually requiring less than a two-week duration; often just one or two days) which includes international travel to financial institutions in London, is an important part of the work. Time away from the office may average 10 to 30 percent of work hours. Lummus Technology is the global leader in developing technology solutions that make modern life possible and focus on a more sustainable, low carbon future. We license process technologies in clean fuels, renewables, petrochemicals, polymers, gas processing and supply lifecycle services, catalysts, proprietary equipment and digitalization to customers worldwide.
